Plate XLVII

Butterfly Conundrum

Oil on gesso panel · 5¾ × 11¾ inches
2015, reworked 2020
CR P.2015.012

Reworked in 2020 with a substantial amount of added detail. Later revisited as a drypoint intaglio print (CR PR.2021.008).

Plates LXII — LXIII

The 2021 Drypoint Series

Drypoint intaglio · 8 × 10 inches · editions of 12

A sequence of intaglio plates revisiting earlier panel paintings — the painted image translated into scribed line.

Plate LXXIX

Installation · dimensions variable
2023 · Truth or Consequences, NM
